case_title: TGT, LLC VS. JOSEPH MELI ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TGT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOSEPH MELI ADVANCE ENTERTAINMENT LLC $9,655,932.08 PRINCIPAL, $3,064,689.91 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,721,056.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH MELI ADVANCE ENTERTAINMENT LLC

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF TGT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH MELI ADVANCE ENTERTAINMENT LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
COST BILL, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED ($.00 ON INTEREST, $.00 ON PRINCIPAL), $3,064,689.91 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TGT, LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $249,988.00 AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH MELI ADVANCE ENTERTAINMENT LLC
